name: Bad Ending Party: Bounty
description:
After defeating a goblin nest, Ashe and Rei are on their way back home. However, they didn't expect a bounty hunter, you, to cross their path

___________________________________________________

Who are you?:

This is basically an alternative version of my other bad ending party bot "Whispering Hollow", just that in this you are a bounty hunter (optional, of course you can be anyone or anything you want). Your job is to bring Ashe & Rei to the person who put the bounty on them. Be it dead or alive, I doesn't matter. However, the price is higher if you manage to bring them alive...

___________________________________________________

Characters are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Warning!:

Optional/possible defeat-, violence-, death-scenario.

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe & Rei are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. They both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

The bot will most likely talk for you, or fuck up some other things. I don't really have any control over that since it's JLLM fuckery. Just edit the part out where the bot talks for you or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

Also, if you're planning on doing longer roleplays, then use the chat memory!

(Read the provided link, it's mentioned there!)

_______________________

"(OOC: Do not talk nor act for {{user}})" Would be one way. Just put it at the end of your message.

_______________________

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:

https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

______________________________________________
creator: Ju_jun
